Let me just implement a clean dynamic version:

```javascript
const numLogos = gridLogos.length;
const desktopCols = Math.min(numLogos, 4);
const mobileCols = Math.min(numLogos, 2);
const desktopRows = Math.ceil(numLogos / desktopCols);
const mobileRows = Math.ceil(numLogos / mobileCols);

const desktopRow = Math.floor(i / desktopCols);
const desktopCol = i % desktopCols;
const mobileRow = Math.floor(i / mobileCols);
const mobileCol = i % mobileCols;

const isHighlighted = (desktopRow + desktopCol) % 2 === 0;
const hasBottomBorder = desktopRow < desktopRows - 1;
const hasRightBorderMobile = mobileCol < mobileCols - 1;
const hasRightBorderDesktop = desktopCol < desktopCols - 1;
```

- `border-b` if `hasBottomBorder`
- `border-r` if `hasRightBorderMobile` (always, for mobile)
- `md:border-r` if `hasRightBorderDesktop` (desktop only)
